title: Create Air Forge (A ThinAir compat)
description: A port of jc776's Copper Lungs made to work with Fuzss' Thin Air.
body:
Port of Copper Lungs by jc776 to 1.19 made to work with Thin Air (Miners Lung port), this mod allows Create diving suits to be used with Thin Air. When wearing a diving helmet and a tank with some air inside, that will be used instead of the player's air supply.
Requires Create and Thin Air.

-Copper Lungs (the original mod by jc776)
-Create (used for the diving gear)
-Thin Air (providing the oxygen mechanic)

[Fabric version by bitheaven]
